authority_scope.selection_rule: NSW jurisdiction tag, deduplicated by authority slug

request_scope: Each authority's public request feed as discovered by fyi-cli discover --authority, with one sequential worker, one-second minimum interval, and no attachments or publication.

approval.scope: bounded read-only discovery and capture planning

next_gate: Obtain an approved, hash-pinned Internet Archive CDX or other rights-cleared source artifact covering this exact NSW authority scope before empirical freezing.
